failure_mode: Capacity fade > 15% after formation
root_cause: Moisture ingress during electrolyte filling due to dry room dew point excursion
contributing_factors: Extended cell exposure time (8 min vs 5 min spec)
resolution: Re-calibrated dry room humidity sensors; added secondary moisture check step before sealing.

failure_mode: High internal resistance, localized hotspots
root_cause: Weak ultrasonic tab welds due to amplitude drift on welding horn
resolution: Replaced worn welding horn; tightened amplitude tolerance checks to every 4 hours.

failure_mode: Voltage drop during shipment, micro-short detected
root_cause: Separator damage from misaligned stacking causing electrode-to-electrode contact
resolution: Replaced stacking fixture; added automated vision alignment check after each stack.

failure_mode: Lithium plating detected in teardown analysis
root_cause: Excessive formation charging current (0.3C instead of 0.2C spec)
contributing_factors: Operator did not verify charge profile
resolution: Reduced formation current to 0.2C per SOP-FORM-009; locked firmware configuration.

failure_mode: Coating weight non-uniformity causing capacity variation
root_cause: Slot-die nozzle clogging from agglomerated conductive carbon particles
contributing_factors: Extended mixer run time beyond 240 min spec
resolution: Added inline 100-micron slurry filter; enforced mixing time limit per SOP-MIX-001.

failure_mode: Internal short circuit traced to electrode edge burrs
root_cause: Excessive slitting blade wear beyond 50,000m cumulative cut length
resolution: Implemented blade-life tracking system; reduced slitting line speed by 10%.

failure_mode: Voltage drop during shipment
root_cause: Micro-short circuit from separator damage during cell stacking
resolution: Lowered stacking room temperature; added separator inspection step.

failure_mode: Cell swelling within 48 hours of filling
root_cause: Incomplete vacuum soak causing trapped air pockets and gas generation
contributing_factors: Soak time reduced to meet throughput target
resolution: Restored vacuum soak time to 30 minutes; serviced vacuum pump seals.

failure_mode: Lithium plating detected in teardown analysis
root_cause: Excessive formation charging current (0.3C)
resolution: Recalibrated formation testers; added automated current-profile verification.

failure_mode: Weld splatter causing internal particle contamination
root_cause: Laser welder power set above spec (1100W vs 800-1000W range)
resolution: Restored laser power setpoint; added mandatory post-maintenance weld verification.

failure_mode: Residual solvent above spec causing gassing during formation
root_cause: Convection oven zone 4 temperature sensor failure causing under-drying
contributing_factors: Sensor not included in preventive maintenance checklist
resolution: Replaced faulty sensor; added oven sensors to PM checklist.

failure_mode: Electrode thickness variation causing inconsistent capacity
root_cause: Calender roll gap drift due to thermal expansion beyond compensation range
resolution: Added closed-loop thermal compensation; recalibrated thickness gauges.

failure_mode: Self-discharge anomaly, voltage drop > 30mV during aging
root_cause: Latent micro-short from particle contamination introduced during stacking
contributing_factors: Cleanroom particle count exceeded class limit
resolution: Replaced HEPA filters; increased particle count monitoring frequency.

failure_mode: Weld tensile strength below 15N spec
root_cause: Ultrasonic welding amplitude drift below 60-micron lower limit
resolution: Shortened calibration interval; scheduled horn replacement program.

failure_mode: Capacity fade > 15% after formation
root_cause: Moisture ingress during electrolyte filling
resolution: Replaced dry room door seals; reduced personnel traffic during shift changes.

failure_mode: Edge bead exceeding 2mm causing slitting defects downstream
root_cause: Slot-die lip wear causing uneven slurry bead formation
resolution: Refurbished slot-die lip; added die wear inspection to quarterly PM.

failure_mode: Telescoping of wound jelly roll causing dimensional defects
root_cause: Winding tension below 8N spec causing layer slippage
contributing_factors: Tension controller miscalibration after software update
resolution: Recalibrated tension controller; validated settings after every software update.

failure_mode: Cell venting during formation, gas release exceeding normal levels
root_cause: Incomplete degassing prior to resealing, trapping excess formation gas
contributing_factors: Degassing step skipped due to line scheduling pressure
resolution: Enforced mandatory degassing checkpoint with line stoppage interlock.

failure_mode: Capacity binning mismatch, cells graded outside 2% tolerance
root_cause: Capacity grading tester current sensor drift
resolution: Recalibrated grading tester sensors; reduced calibration interval to monthly.

failure_mode: Capacity fade and early voltage instability after formation
root_cause: Moisture ingress during electrolyte filling caused by dry room humidity spike
contributing_factors: Cell exposure time exceeded 5 minute spec
resolution: Serviced dehumidification unit; reinforced operator training on exposure time limits.
